Ah, Connor McDavid. He played for our local team before going to the NHL, and went to high school here. Was always away from class practicing, and basically single-handedly led our local team to championships. Cousin of mine went to high school with him and said he was actually a pretty great guy, too. We all were kinda sad that he didn’t stay somewhat local going to the Penguins, but it is what it is.

One of the few left. Happy for you that you still have a team. I was a lifelong fan, loyal to the soil, rooted for em just the same wether they were 14-2 or 2-14, but I for one cannot get behind rooting for a Los Angeles team. Even if it is my once revered Chargers. Hurts me still, had to pack away all my gear, every Tomlinson jersey, every Neal jersey, every hat, every stupid fucking foam finger I’d collected my 34 years as a fan, and it sucks. If they ever come back (sometime after 2040, but still) Id root for em with all the same passion and zest as I ever had, just cant root for an LA team, period. Tl;dr- sob sob cry cry, Ill be a SAN DIEGO Chargers fan till I die
